zh.lifeSummary: 當Alured de Wallur II於1094年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特時，他的父親Alured de Wallur I59歲，母親de Morny34歲。他於1124年與Adelina Gumbert在英國諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1175年在英國諾廷加姆爾霍可頓享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alured de Wallur II于1094年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特时，他的父亲Alured de Wallur I59岁，母亲de Morny34岁。他于1124年与Adelina Gumbert在英国諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1175年在英国諾廷加姆爾霍可頓享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wallur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English waler, waliere, walour, waller ‘builder of walls, mason’.
English: in Sussex, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent wall.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English waller, a derivative of Middle English walle, Old English wælle, wælle. It is a West Midlands dialect form of Weller .

variants.name: Weller
meanings: English (Surrey, Sussex, and Kent): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English weller, willer, an agent derivative of Middle English welle (in southern England) and wille (in south western England), from Old English wella, well(e), wiella, wielle, willa, wyll(a), wylle. This type of name, a topographic term + -er, is particularly typical of Sussex and its neigbouring counties.
English: occupational name for someone who casts metal or who boils salt, from Middle English weller, willer, a derivative with -er of Old English wellan, wiellan ‘to boil’. Compare 5 below.
North German: variant of   Welle  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Alured
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English name derived from ælf ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ræd ‘counsel’. It was a relatively common name before the Norman Conquest of Britain, being borne most notably by Alfred the Great ( 849–899 ), King of Wessex. After the Conquest it was adopted by the Normans in a variety of more or less radically altered forms ( see Avery ). In some regions the forms Alvery and Avery never fell entirely out of favour and became locally popular in the 16th century. It provides a rare example ( Edward is another) of a distinctively Old English name that has spread widely on the Continent. It was strongly revived in the 19th century, along with other names of pre-Conquest historical figures, faded in the mid-20th century, but has since recovered some popularity.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alured de Wallur II was born in 1094, in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Alured de Wallur I, was 59 and his mother, de Morny, was 34. He married Adelina Gumbert in 1124, in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1175, in Hockerton, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alured de Wallur II est né en 1094, à Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Alured de Wallur I, avait 59 ans et sa mère, de Morny, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Adelina Gumbert en 1124, à Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1175, à Hockerton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alured de Wallur II 1094 in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alured de Wallur I 59 und seine Mutter de Morny 34. Er hat 1124 in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England Adelina Gumbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1175 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Hockerton, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alured de Wallur II è nato il nel 1094 nel Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Alured de Wallur I, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, de Morny, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Adelina Gumbert nel 1124, nel Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1175, nel Hockerton, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alured de Wallur IIが1094年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルク-オン-トレントで生まれた時，父Alured de Wallur Iは59歳，母de Mornyは34歳であった。1124年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルク-オン-トレントでAdelina Gumbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1175年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーッカートンで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alured de Wallur II(이)가 1094년 영국 노틴그함실르 뉴아르k--트렌트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alured de Wallur I(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 de Morny(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1124년 영국 노틴그함실르 뉴아르k--트렌트에서 Adelina Gumbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1175년 영국 노틴그함실르 호커턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alured de Wallur II nasceu em 1094, em Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alured de Wallur I, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, de Morny, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelina Gumbert em 1124, em Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1175, em Hockerton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alured de Wallur II родился в 1094 г. в местности нюарк-он-трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alured de Wallur I было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали de Morny, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelina Gumbert в 1124 г. в местности нюарк-он-трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1175 г. в местности хоккиртон, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alured de Wallur II nació en 1094, en Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alured de Wallur I, tenía 59 años y su mamá, de Morny, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Adelina Gumbert en 1124, en Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1175, en Hockerton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años.
